target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Large portions of the brick facade are missing; structural elements are collapsed and debris is scattered at the base; roof is largely gone; visible collapse of load-bearing sections consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a large, multi-story brick building with extensive structural damage, missing walls, collapsed sections, and debris at its base, indicating complete functional loss.
